Scope of work includes: Store Setup • Configure Shopify account, domain, currency, and core settings • Set up payments (Shopify Payments or equivalent) and test checkout Product Setup • Upload a digital product (ebook) • Integrate a digital delivery system so customers automatically receive the file after purchase Storefront • Build a simple, high-converting shop front • Optimize for mobile and fast loading Email & Delivery • Set up order confirmation and delivery emails • Ensure download links are sent immediately after purchase Legal & Policies • Set up Privacy Policy, Terms, Refund Policy, and Contact page Testing • Fully test the purchase flow end-to-end • Ensure everything works smoothly on mobile and desktop Important: This will be done via live video call where I share my screen and you guide me step by step through the setup. You must be highly experienced, detail-oriented, and able to clearly explain each step in real time. Please include examples of similar Shopify work and confirm you can guide the full process live via screen share.

jobs.description: Title: Shopify Designer–Developer for Minimal Luxury Archive Website (Bilingual AR/EN) --- Project Overview: We are building Ateeq — a curated, archive-led luxury resale platform focused on archived designer pieces. This is not a typical e-commerce store. Each product functions as: - A product listing (pre-sale) - A permanent archive record (post-sale) The website should feel closer to an editorial archive or digital museum than a marketplace. --- Current Status: - Brand identity complete (logo, color palette, typography) - Content written for key pages (About, Authentication, etc.) - Clear structure and product logic defined - Homepage and product page direction will be provided (structured outlines) - Temporary Shopify theme used as placeholder for coming soon page --- What We Are Looking For: A Shopify designer–developer (hybrid) who can: - Recommend the right Shopify theme - Design clean, minimal layouts within that system - Fully implement the website in Shopify This role requires both: - Strong Shopify development skills - Good design judgment (minimal, editorial, luxury feel) --- Scope of Work: ### 1. Theme Selection & Setup - Recommend and implement the most suitable Shopify theme - Ensure flexibility and scalability --- ### 2. Homepage Design & Build - Design and implement homepage based on provided structure - Maintain strong hierarchy and minimal layout --- ### 3. Archive Product (Collection) Pages - Design product listing pages that feel curated, not marketplace-driven - Keep filtering clean and minimal --- ### 4. Product Page (Archive Passport) — Core Requirement Each product page must function as a permanent archive record. Includes: - Structured product information (editorial + technical) - Pre-sale vs post-sale behavior - Clean, minimal layout Each product page will also be linked to a QR code (printed on physical tags), so the page must function as a long-term accessible record. --- ### 5. Private Ownership Layer After purchase, additional sections should be visible only to the owner (logged-in customer): - Bill of sale - Serial number - Packing / fulfillment media -Price Requires: - Customer-based access logic - Conditional rendering --- ### 6. Customer Accounts & Access - Implement Shopify customer accounts (login/logout) - Enable conditional visibility based on logged-in user - Support owner-specific access to private product information --- ### 7. Metafields & Product Data Structure - Implement structured Shopify metafields for: - Public archive data - Private ownership data - Internal product data - Ensure clean, scalable structure --- ### 8. Static Pages - Build clean layouts for: - About Ateeq - Authentication - Archive Passport - Shipping - Returns - …etc --- ### 9. Bilingual Implementation (Arabic + English) - Implement full bilingual structure (Arabic + English) from day one - Ensure proper layout handling, including RTL (right-to-left) for Arabic - Maintain consistent structure and navigation across both languages - Ensure typography, spacing, and layout work well in both languages - Ensure product pages work seamlessly in both languages, especially when accessed via QR code on mobile devices --- ### 10. Currency - Store will be based in SAR (Saudi Riyal) - Structure should support clean price display and allow future multi-currency support if needed --- ### 11. Checkout & Purchase Flow - Ensure clean and functional Shopify checkout experience - Validate full purchase flow from product page to order completion - Support standard Shopify payment integrations, including Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) options (e.g. Tabby, Tamara) --- ### 12. Scalability - Structure must support: - Long-term archive growth - Selling across multiple channels (website, physical POS, and third-party platforms) - Maintaining a single product record per item --- Site Structure & Page Direction: The website will follow a minimal, structured navigation: - Archive (main product area) - Journal (future-ready) - About - Services - Information We will provide structured outlines for: - Homepage - Product page (Archive Passport) - Key static pages The developer is expected to translate this into clean, well-designed layouts. ### Site Structure & Page Direction The website will follow a minimal, structured navigation and clear content hierarchy. **Static Pages:** - Home page - About - Authentication - Archive Passport - Packaging & Shipping - Returns - Contact (including WhatsApp link) -Join the Archive (Subscribe to the mailing list ) Content for these pages will be provided. --- **Archive (Dynamic Product Collection):** The main product area (“Archive”) will include: - All Pieces - Available Pieces - Archived Pieces (sold items) Products should be filterable by structured attributes such as: - Brand / House - Era - Category - Other relevant attributes as needed The Archive should feel curated and editorial, not like a typical marketplace. --- **Navigation Structure:** Top-level navigation should remain clean and minimal, with Archive as the primary entry point for browsing products. The developer is expected to translate this structure into a clear, intuitive navigation system across both desktop and mobile. --- **Page Direction:** Structured outlines for: - Homepage - Product page (Archive Passport) - Static pages will be provided. The developer is responsible for translating these into clean, well-designed layouts aligned with the overall minimal, editorial direction. --- Design Direction: - Minimal - Editorial - Luxury - Calm, structured layout - No marketplace patterns (no “best sellers”, “drops”, etc.) --- ### Responsive & Mobile Experience - The website must be fully responsive across devices - Special attention should be given to mobile experience, as users may access product pages via QR codes - Mobile layouts should maintain the same minimal, clean, editorial feel as desktop --- Important Notes: - This is not a standard Shopify store - Focus is on structure, clarity, and long-term scalability - Business configuration (payments, VAT, shipping) will be handled internally --- Requirements: - Strong Shopify experience (Liquid, themes, metafields) - Ability to design clean, minimal layouts (not just implement) - Experience with premium themes - Understanding of conditional logic for user-specific content --- Nice to Have: - Experience with luxury or fashion brands - Editorial-style websites - Experience with bilingual (Arabic/English) Shopify builds --- Project Approach: We prefer a phase-based delivery, for example: - Phase 1: Theme selection + homepage - Phase 2: Product page + core logic - Phase 3: Remaining pages + polish Open to recommendations on structuring phases. --- Timeline: Flexible, but ideally within 4–6 weeks. --- Budget: Open to proposals based on scope and experience. --- To Apply: Please include: 1. 2–3 relevant Shopify projects (minimal / editorial preferred) 2. Which theme you would recommend and why 3. How you would approach: - A product page that works as both a store and an archive - Showing some content only to the buyer --- Important: We are not building a typical Shopify store. We are building a long-term archive platform with commerce capabilities.
jobs.title: Shopify Designer–Developer for Minimal Luxury Archive Website (Bilingual AR/EN)

jobs.description: **Shopify Developer Needed – Single-Product Wellness/Supplement Store** --- **About the Project** We are launching a new direct-to-consumer brand selling a wellness supplement product (powder format). We need a polished, conversion-focused Shopify store built from scratch, inspired by the look and feel of https://www.aplusnutri.com/ — a clean, single-product store with a strong brand identity, trust-building elements, and a smooth checkout experience. This is a real, funded project with a hard deadline. We are NOT looking for someone who needs weeks to deliver — the store must be fully completed and ready to launch by Thursday 17 April 2026. **Please only apply if you can commit to this deadline.** --- **What We Need** - Custom Shopify store setup (theme selection or custom theme build) - Single hero product page with high-converting layout: - Product imagery/mockup integration - Ingredient highlights / benefit sections - Reviews / social proof section - FAQ section - Subscription/bundle upsell options (if applicable) - Announcement bar with rotating promotional messages - Email opt-in section - Mobile-first, fully responsive design - Multi-language support (at minimum English + one other language) - Multi-currency support - ParcelPanel or similar order tracking integration - Basic policy pages (shipping, returns, privacy, terms) - Payment gateway setup (Stripe, PayPal, Shop Pay, etc.) - Page speed optimisation --- **Reference Site** Please review this site before applying: https://www.aplusnutri.com/ We want a similar feel: minimal, premium, wellness-oriented. We are NOT looking for a copy — we want our own branding and identity built in a similar style. --- **Ideal Candidate** - Proven experience building Shopify stores for DTC (direct-to-consumer) supplement or wellness brands - Strong eye for clean, premium design — not just a developer, but someone who understands branding - Experience with Shopify's Online Store 2.0 / Liquid - Familiarity with conversion rate optimisation (CRO) best practices - Ability to work independently and communicate clearly in English - Available to start immediately and deliver by Thursday 17 April 2026 - Portfolio of similar projects is required — please share links to Shopify stores you have built --- **Nice to Have** - Experience with Klaviyo or other email marketing integrations - Knowledge of Shopify subscription apps (e.g. Recharge, Seal Subscriptions) - Experience with upsell/cross-sell apps (e.g. ReConvert) --- **Project Details** - Budget: [Your budget here] - Deadline: Thursday 17 April 2026 — no exceptions - Platform: Shopify - Communication: Daily updates via message; available for quick calls if needed --- **To Apply** Please include: 1. Confirmation that you can deliver by Thursday 17 April 2026 2. Links to 2–3 Shopify stores you have built (ideally supplement or wellness brands) 3. A brief note on your approach — how would you tackle this project? 4. Your cost breakdown Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.
jobs.title: Shopify Developer Needed – Single-Product Wellness/Supplement Store*

jobs.description: Hi, I’m looking for a Shopify developer who can help improve my product pages – mainly structure, usability and mobile behavior. Important upfront I’m using a custom-built Shopify theme, so I need someone who is comfortable working directly in code (Liquid, HTML, CSS, JS) – not just page builders. What I currently have Product descriptions are too long and poorly formatted Text blocks have too much spacing Content appears duplicated on mobile The "full description" and other sections sometimes show twice If I hide/show elements, it breaks layout consistency across desktop/mobile What I want instead 1. Modular content structure Ability to build product pages like: text → image → text → image (flexible order) Not one long text block Easy to maintain per product 2. Custom product tabs (per product) Tabs like: Description Ingredients / Details Preparation / Usage Important: content must be individually editable per product, not global 3. Collapsible / accordion sections Option to shorten long text “Read more” / expandable sections Clean UX, especially on mobile 4. Fix mobile issues Remove duplicate content on mobile Ensure consistent display between desktop & mobile No breaking when toggling sections on/off 5. Improve visual layout Reduce spacing between elements Make layout more compact and structured More like a mix of: text + image blocks small info sections instead of long paragraphs Reference / Direction I like the structure of Pure Tea product pages: Shorter content blocks Better mix of text and visuals Cleaner and more modern layout Tech stack Shopify (custom theme) Liquid / HTML / CSS / JavaScript No heavy page builder preferred What I need from you Suggest best approach (custom sections vs. metafields vs. app) Implement clean, reusable solution Keep it simple to maintain (I update products myself) Please see loom to what I need here: https://www.loom.com/share/fcc1fbb428284753b48339e46b719f84
jobs.title: Shopify Product Page Optimization (Layout, Tabs & Mobile Fix)

jobs.description: Hi there, I’m looking for an experienced Meta Ads Specialist with a strong focus on Shopify tracking & pixel setups. I’ve been running Shopify stores and Meta Ads for over 2 years, so I’m very familiar with the standard setup process (pixel installation, events manager, domain verification, etc.). However, I’m currently running into a persistent issue connecting my pixel to new ad accounts, and I can’t seem to resolve it. That’s where you come in. What I need help with: Troubleshooting Meta Pixel connection issues Ensuring proper connection between: Shopify store Meta Business Manager Ad accounts Diagnosing why the pixel is not linking to new ad accounts Fixing potential issues with: Permissions / access Business Manager structure Data sources Event tracking Making sure everything is set up clean and scalable for multiple ad accounts Important context: I’ve done this setup many times before, so this is not a beginner issue The basic steps are all correctly followed (as far as I can tell) I’m specifically looking for someone who can debug deeper issues and spot what I’m missing Requirements: Proven experience with Meta Ads & Shopify integrations Strong understanding of: Meta Business Manager structure Pixels, datasets, and events Domain verification & Aggregated Event Measurement Experience with multi-ad-account setups Ability to quickly diagnose and fix technical issues Nice to have: Experience working with scaling e-commerce brands Familiarity with tools like Funnelish or advanced tracking setups Goal: Fix the issue fast and ensure a stable, scalable tracking setup going forward.
jobs.title: Meta Specialist Shopify (Pixel Issue)

jobs.description: FAQ SECTION - Product & Collection Pages: I have a paid Shopify theme with FAQ accordion blocks on my product and collection pages. I need to be able to edit the FAQ questions and answers, including adding hyperlinks within the answers, directly from the Shopify admin without going into the theme customiser. I want the FAQ's to match the existing accordion. Can you either adjust how the FAQs are built so I can edit them easily, or set up a metafield structure that makes this straightforward for me to manage myself going forward? - I can provide specific copy for the updates (approx 3 - 5 updates in the FAQ's per page). ABOUT / STORY PAGE: Add a small spacing gap between the awards images section and the "What We Stand For" heading block beneath it.
jobs.title: Shopify Ecom Site - Developer Updates

jobs.description: I’m looking for an experienced web developer to complete a clean, fast, mobile‑first website for a small Australian product brand. All wireframes, content, and layout specifications are ready. Your role is to turn these into a pixel‑perfect build using a lightweight, high‑performance approach. The site includes a long‑scroll homepage, five product pages, a size‑guide page, and a simple information page. Checkout is straightforward with flat‑rate shipping only. No custom plugins, no subscriptions, and no bloated page builders.ry.
jobs.title: Website Completion – Pixel‑Perfect Build From Wireframes (Fixed Price)

jobs.description: We are seeking a skilled freelancer to design and develop a Shopify store for our brand. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating visually appealing and user-friendly e-commerce websites. Responsibilities include designing the store layout, integrating payment gateways, and ensuring mobile responsiveness. The project requires an intermediate level of proficiency and is expected to be completed in less than a month.
jobs.title: Shopify Store Design and Development

jobs.description: Looking for a highly experienced dropshipping expert to help me build a profitable car detailing dropshipping business focused on the Brazilian market. I already have the website created with Wordpress and with Woocommerce. The ideal candidate must know how to identify low-cost, high-potential products from China or other reliable low-cost sourcing locations, and also know how to set up the full dropshipping workflow on a WordPress website with WooCommerce. NO SHOPIFY!!!!! Main goals of this project • Research and identify the 25 best dropshipping products related to car detailing • Focus only on products with strong potential for the Brazilian market • Prioritize very low-cost products with good profit margins • Work only with reliable, highly rated suppliers • Add at least 5 selected products to my WooCommerce store • Teach me how to manage the process by myself after setup The freelancer should be able to: • Research winning car detailing products • Source products from China or other low-cost locations • Evaluate supplier quality, ratings, delivery reliability, and product costs • Recommend products suitable for dropshipping into Brazil • Set up the dropshipping workflow on WordPress + WooCommerce • Add at least 5 products to my website, including product details • Explain the full process clearly so I can repeat it myself later The products must be: • Related to car detailing • Suitable for the Brazilian car detailing market • Low cost but with good profit potential • Supplied by reliable and highly rated suppliers • Available from China or another low-cost source • Practical to ship and not overly fragile, bulky, or risky for returns About the freelancer candidate • A real expert in dropshipping • Experienced with WooCommerce and WordPress • Familiar with product research and supplier selection • Professional, reliable, and easy to communicate with • Able to set up the full dropshipping process • Able to teach and explain each step in a simple way At the end of the project, I expect: • A list of 25 recommended car detailing products • Supplier links and justification for each recommendation • At least 5 products added to my WooCommerce store • Guidance on how to manage orders, suppliers, and fulfillment - Tutorial in Word • A simple step-by-step explanation so I can continue by myself - Tutorial in Word To apply, please include • Examples of Your experience with dropshipping and WooCommerce projects you have completed • Your process for selecting winning products and reliable suppliers • Your knowledge of the Brazilian market, if any • Estimated timeline and what exactly is included in your service Please do not apply unless you can provide: • Proven experience in dropshipping and WooCommerce experience • Real specific supplier research, not generic product lists • Clear communication in English • A practical teaching approach
jobs.title: Top experienced dropshipping expert

jobs.description: Hi, We are looking for a developer to work for us on an ongoing basis. We'll handle all the project management and client communication. All we need is front-end development for Shopify stores (completing assigned tasks on Asana and QAing their work properly). You should be independent, reliable, and an effective communicator. The right candidate we’re looking for: -Works STRICTLY US-Timezones, happy to join our Slack to be notified of new tasks we'd like to fix quickly. -Accountable, and takes pride in their work. Attention to detail (delivering perfect quality, never submitting sloppy work). -Has good communication skills and excellent responsivity. Ability to communicate clearly with fast response times. Does what he promises. -Punctuality and ability to deliver on promises, sticking to a schedule. -Starts the application with words "blue and white". -You are willing to report on what you have been doing and be transparent. -We expect you to follow the best coding practices and to make this easy for us as project managers. -We need a developer with extensive experience in A/B Test Setups using Intelligems, Omniconvert, and Mida. Does it sound like you? Submit an application, and we can take it from there. PS. Do not contact us outside of Upwork. PPS. Not looking to work with agencies, we are already an agency.
jobs.title: Front-End Developer for an Expert Shopify Agency Needed for Ongoing Work (For US Timezone)

jobs.description: I am launching a premium skincare brand called Zevoria™, and I am looking for a skilled Shopify expert to build a high-converting, clean, and luxury-style online store. This is NOT a basic dropshipping store. I want a professional brand look that feels like a real skincare company. Project Scope: - Build a Shopify store from scratch (or redesign existing store) - Create a clean, modern, and premium homepage - Design a high-converting product page (focused on results and simplicity) - Ensure full mobile optimization - Implement a simple and smooth user experience Brand Direction: - Premium, clean, minimal design - Colors: green, gold, white (branding already created) - Focus on “glow”, natural skincare, and confidence Important: - The store must be conversion-focused, not just visually nice - I want someone who understands e-commerce and customer behavior - Experience with skincare or beauty brands is a plus What I need from you: - Examples of Shopify stores you have built (preferably skincare/beauty) - Your approach to building a high-converting store - Estimated timeline Goal: Build a store that looks like a premium brand and is optimized to convert visitors into customers. If you read this, start your proposal with the word “ZEVORIA,” so I know you paid attention.
jobs.title: Build a High-Conversion Shopify Store for a Premium Skincare Brand (Zevoria™)

jobs.description: Shopify (50%) •Manage and optimize our Shopify store (Beatnik/Symmetry theme) •Upload, edit, and organize product listings across 300+ SKUs •Improve product pages for conversion (copy, images, layout, structured data) •Configure collections, navigation, filters, and on-site search •Install, configure, and troubleshoot Shopify apps •Monitor site performance, page speed, and mobile experience •Run A/B tests on landing pages and checkout flow Google Ads (50%) •Plan, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, Performance Max) •Build and maintain the Google Merchant Center product feed •Monitor daily performance: ROAS, CPA, CTR, conversion rate •Optimize bids, budgets, keywords, and audiences •Run remarketing campaigns and audience segmentation •Produce weekly performance reports with clear next actions •Coordinate with our content team on ad creative Requirements •Bachelor's degree required •2+ years hands-on experience managing Shopify stores (not just using them) •2+ years managing Google Ads accounts with monthly spend of $5K+ •Proven track record of improving ROAS or conversion rate (please share examples) •Solid understanding of Google Merchant Center and product feed optimization •Comfortable with Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager •Strong English reading and writing ability (our market is the US) •Detail-oriented, data-driven, and able to work independently Nice to Have •Experience with cross-border e-commerce to the US market •Background in home goods, furniture, or lighting categories •Experience with high-AOV products ($1,000+) •Familiarity with Shopify Liquid for theme customization •Meta Ads or Pinterest Ads experience •Experience with AI tools for marketing workflows What We Offer •Competitive base salary + performance bonus •Direct ownership of marketing channels — your decisions, your results •Growing brand with strong product-market fit in a premium category •Day shift schedule (China hours) •Collaborative team across China, Philippines, and the US How to Apply Please send: 1.Your CV 2.2–3 examples of Shopify stores you've worked on 3.A brief case study of one Google Ads account you've managed (industry, monthly spend, key results)
jobs.title: Shopify Specialist

jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced Shopify developer available CET (European time zone) You'll join the team of Famme.com , a Norwegian clothing brand for women. We are on the Dawn theme. You must use AI agents in your workflow, and be able to help your colleagues to improve and work more efficient.
jobs.title: Shopify Developer & AI Agent user (Codex, Claude or similar)

jobs.description: I’m looking for an experienced Shopify expert to build out a full premium website. I already have the Shopify account created. I need someone to handle the design, structure, and setup from start to finish. Project Scope: Theme installation and customization Homepage layout design Navigation and menu setup Product collections and sub collections Organization by category and by brand Premium layout for phone and website Mobile responsive design Basic on page SEO setup Shopify best practices for structure and performance Store Details: Approximately 50 products fitwesr ecommerce brand like alo yoga and skims etc Collections by category like men , women , fitwesr and swimwear and accessories etc . Blog setup Booking link integration Conversion focused homepage layout SEO Requirements: Proper page titles Meta descriptions Clean URLs Collection structure for SEO Blog SEO setup Header structure H1 H2 H3 Image alt tags I will be providing: Shopify access Product information Example websites for style direction You should: Have strong Shopify experience Understand ecommerce UX Be able to organize collections properly Understand on page SEO for Shopify Have examples of Shopify stores you built Timeline: Start immediately Completion within 3-5 days Please include: Examples of Shopify stores you built Your process for structuring collections
jobs.title: Shopify Expert Needed for Full Store Setup, Theme Design, Collections, checkout etc and On Page SEO

jobs.description: About Us: UX-driven team building D2C Shopify stores (beauty tech). Focus: conversion, experimentation, performance. Intro: We’re looking for a long-term Shopify development partner who goes beyond execution. Someone who actively thinks along, improves our tech stack, and contributes to building high performing user experiences—not just shipping tickets. Role: - Implement A/B test variants (UI, UX, content) - Collaborate closely with our UX Designer - Optimize themes (performance, structure) - Ensure stability of key flows (Cart, Checkout, PDP) What We Strictly Require: 1. Proactive Communication If something is unclear—or you see a better way—pause and communicate. 2. Clean Code & Architecture Your code should be readable, maintainable, and scalable. 3. No “Blind” AI Coding AI can assist—but not replace understanding. You must fully own and understand the code you deliver. 4. Impact Awareness Before pushing changes, you must ensure that critical flows (Cart, Checkout, PDPs) remain fully functional. Technical Skills: - Expert in Shopify development - Strong experience with Liquid, HTML5, CSS3, and Vanilla JavaScript - Shopify Legacy Themes vs. Online Store 2.0 - Ability to clearly document changes for team transparency Engagement Details: - Long-term collaboration - Ongoing A/B testing and optimization work - Flexible workload based on experiment pipeline
jobs.title: Senior Shopify Developer (UX-Focused, A/B Testing, Long-Term Partnership)

jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced Shopify expert to manage and optimize our furniture system on the platform. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of Shopify's functionalities and be able to troubleshoot any issues that may arise. Your role will include setting up product listings, managing inventory, and ensuring seamless integration of the furniture system. If you are detail-oriented and possess a passion for e-commerce, we would love to hear from you! **Relevant Skills:** - Shopify Management - E-commerce Experience - Inventory Management - Product Listing Optimization - Troubleshooting and Problem Solving - Attention to Detail
jobs.title: Shopify Furniture System Management Expert Needed

jobs.description: We're looking for a **Developer / Funnel Builder** to own the build and delivery of high-converting landing pages, listicles, advertorials, and sales funnels on Shopify. This is a hands-on execution role. You'll work closely with our Creative Strategists, Copywriters, and Graphic Designers to bring funnel concepts to life — fast, clean, and optimized for performance. **Location:** Remote (Asia or LATAM preferred) **Type:** Full-Time Contractor **Reports to:** Head of Direct Response & CMO --- **What You'll Do** **Funnel Building & Development** - Build landing pages, listicles, advertorials, and sales funnels on Shopify using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript - Work with tools like GemPages, Replo, or custom Shopify sections as needed - Translate wireframes, copy docs, and design assets into fully functional, high-converting pages - Ensure pages are mobile-optimized, fast-loading, and pixel-perfect - Implement tracking (pixels, UTMs, conversion events) correctly on every page **Collaboration & Execution** - Work closely with Creative Strategists (who define the funnel concept and angle) - Work closely with Copywriters (who provide the copy and messaging) - Work closely with Graphic Designers (who provide visuals and assets) - Turn around funnel builds quickly — we test new funnels weekly - Communicate progress, blockers, and timelines proactively **AI Integration** - Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, etc.) to accelerate your workflow — code generation, debugging, optimization suggestions - Know when AI output is good and when it's wrong — you're the quality filter, not the AI - Continuously improve your process by integrating AI where it adds speed without sacrificing quality **Optimization & Iteration** - Implement A/B test variations quickly when needed - Make updates and iterations based on performance feedback from the media buying team - Maintain a library of reusable templates and components for faster builds - Document your builds so others can understand and maintain them --- ### **What We're Looking For** **Must-Haves:** - 2+ years experience building landing pages, funnels, or custom Shopify pages - Strong proficiency in Shopify Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript - Experience with page builders (GemPages, Replo, PageFly, or similar) - Experience with DTC / ecommerce brands — you've built pages designed to convert, not just look pretty - Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with weekly deadlines - Strong attention to detail — pixel-perfect, mobile-first builds - Proactive communicator — you flag blockers early and keep the team updated - Experience using AI tools in your workflow — and knowing when to trust them and when not to **Nice-to-Haves:** - Experience with conversion rate optimization (CRO) — you understand what makes a page convert - Experience building advertorials or long-form sales pages - Familiarity with tracking setup (Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, Triple Whale) - Experience working with creative or marketing teams (not just solo dev work) - Portfolio of DTC landing pages or funnels you've built --- ### **What Success Looks Like** **First 30 Days:** - Fully onboarded — understand our brand, product, and funnel strategy - Delivered 2-3 landing pages or funnel builds based on team briefs - Established workflow with Creative Strategists, Copywriters, and Designers - Set up reusable templates or components for faster future builds **First 90 Days:** - Delivering 4-5 funnel builds per month consistently - Turnaround time from brief to live page is under 5 business days - Pages are clean, fast, mobile-optimized, and tracking is always correct - You're proactively suggesting improvements — not just executing --- ### **Working Structure** - Full-time dedicated role — 40 hours/week - Remote - Must have overlap with US or EU working hours for collaboration - Slack response time: within 1 hour during working hours - Daily priorities posted in #daily-priorities (BOD and EOD) - Weekly sync with Head of Direct Response --- ### **Tools You'll Use** - Shopify (Liquid, themes, custom sections) - GemPages, Replo, or similar page builders - Figma (receiving designs) - Google Docs / Notion (receiving briefs and copy) - Slack (communication) - AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, etc.) - Google Tag Manager / Meta Pixel / Triple Whale (tracking)
jobs.title: Shopify Funnel Developer

jobs.description: Hi, I’m looking for a Shopify developer who can help improve my product pages – mainly structure, usability and mobile behavior. Important upfront I’m using a custom-built Shopify theme, so I need someone who is comfortable working directly in code (Liquid, HTML, CSS, JS) – not just page builders. What I currently have Product descriptions are too long and poorly formatted Text blocks have too much spacing Content appears duplicated on mobile The "full description" and other sections sometimes show twice If I hide/show elements, it breaks layout consistency across desktop/mobile What I want instead 1. Modular content structure Ability to build product pages like: text → image → text → image (flexible order) Not one long text block Easy to maintain per product 2. Custom product tabs (per product) Tabs like: Description Ingredients / Details Preparation / Usage Important: content must be individually editable per product, not global 3. Collapsible / accordion sections Option to shorten long text “Read more” / expandable sections Clean UX, especially on mobile 4. Fix mobile issues Remove duplicate content on mobile Ensure consistent display between desktop & mobile No breaking when toggling sections on/off 5. Improve visual layout Reduce spacing between elements Make layout more compact and structured More like a mix of: text + image blocks small info sections instead of long paragraphs Reference / Direction I like the structure of Pure Tea product pages: Shorter content blocks Better mix of text and visuals Cleaner and more modern layout Tech stack Shopify (custom theme) Liquid / HTML / CSS / JavaScript No heavy page builder preferred What I need from you Suggest best approach (custom sections vs. metafields vs. app) Implement clean, reusable solution Keep it simple to maintain (I update products myself) Please see loom to what I need here: https://www.loom.com/share/fcc1fbb428284753b48339e46b719f84
jobs.title: Shopify Product Page Optimization (Layout, Tabs & Mobile Fix)

jobs.description: We are seeking an experienced Shopify developer to build and customize our e-commerce store. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of Shopify's platform, including theme development, app integration, and payment gateways. You will be responsible for creating a user-friendly and visually appealing online store that aligns with our brand. If you have a passion for e-commerce and a proven track record of successful Shopify projects, we would love to hear from you!
jobs.title: Shopify Developer Needed for E-commerce Store

jobs.description: Hi there, I’m looking for an experienced Meta Ads Specialist with a strong focus on Shopify tracking & pixel setups. I’ve been running Shopify stores and Meta Ads for over 2 years, so I’m very familiar with the standard setup process (pixel installation, events manager, domain verification, etc.). However, I’m currently running into a persistent issue connecting my pixel to new ad accounts, and I can’t seem to resolve it. That’s where you come in. What I need help with: Troubleshooting Meta Pixel connection issues Ensuring proper connection between: Shopify store Meta Business Manager Ad accounts Diagnosing why the pixel is not linking to new ad accounts Fixing potential issues with: Permissions / access Business Manager structure Data sources Event tracking Making sure everything is set up clean and scalable for multiple ad accounts Important context: I’ve done this setup many times before, so this is not a beginner issue The basic steps are all correctly followed (as far as I can tell) I’m specifically looking for someone who can debug deeper issues and spot what I’m missing Requirements: Proven experience with Meta Ads & Shopify integrations Strong understanding of: Meta Business Manager structure Pixels, datasets, and events Domain verification & Aggregated Event Measurement Experience with multi-ad-account setups Ability to quickly diagnose and fix technical issues Nice to have: Experience working with scaling e-commerce brands Familiarity with tools like Funnelish or advanced tracking setups Goal: Fix the issue fast and ensure a stable, scalable tracking setup going forward.
jobs.title: Meta Specialist Shopify (Pixel Issue)
